title: Mushroom Dimension
description: This mod adds a new Mushroom Dimension to the game, as well as new mushroom themed blocks and items.
body:
Hey guys! It's s1csty9 here, with an epic mod featuring a brand new dimension: The Mushroom Dimension! 

While still very early on in development, I've already added in multiple new blocks and items, and even a new liquid! Also, there's a ton of new content planned in the future, such as new mobs, bosses, weapons and more! This mod is also my first ever minecraft mod, and it is made for forge 1.19.2.

Features:

- New fluid- Mushroom Juice! 
- New mushroom species!
- Compressed mushroom blocks, used to make portals!
- Epic portal textures and particles!
- Mushroom stick
- Big stick
- New recipes, mushroom blocks are now craftable!
- New biomes made exclusively for the Mushroom Dimension!
- Mushroom... dirt???
- And much more!

Please refer to the official wiki listed in external resources for additional information.
